Fan Qing also quickly crawled out of radius, but suddenly, a lily-white hand grabbed his ankle.

Immediately, his hope of escaping was extinguished.

When everyone saw what happened, they were extremely astonished. During the last stretch, Xie Qianxue had surpassed Man Tian and the others. She rushed in front of them and grabbed Fan Qing, who had just went past the five hundred meter boundary of the core pressure zone and dragged him back.

Instantly, Fan Qing's face turned deathly pale. Regardless of how much he struggled, he couldn't crawl even half an inch forward. Soon, Man Tian and his group also caught up with them.

"Traitor, even if you die a million times, my hatred won't be quenched."

Coiling Tiger threw one punch after another toward Fan Qing, but under the formidable pressure, it was as if his action had been slowed down by several folds, losing all strength.

Gradually, more and more descenders crawled to the boundary of the core pressure zone and Fan Qing stopped struggling; he knew that his death was now certain.

After a long time had passed, night fell.

Within this region filled with endless trees, the group of descenders was finally able to struggle out of the pressure zone. By then, they were exhausted.

When they turned around to take a look, they found that the distance from the location they had descended to their current position was three kilometers.

After crossing this region, fear still lingered in everyone's hearts. The formless pressure had simply been too terrifying. Even after crossing three kilometers, everyone could still sense a weak suppression, forcing them to fight back to remain standing.

Fan Qing, or Ye Qing, was filled with despair at this moment as he was being dragged with his hands tied behind his back.

When the group crossed a few more kilometers, the pressure finally completely disappeared, and the unknown threat couldn't be seen anymore.

A mysterious expression flashed through Zhan Wuya's face, and he took the initiative to ask, "What should we do with him?"

Fan En and Fan Ni, because of descending a moment earlier, had already ran away, disappearing without a trace. Thus, all the descenders were gloomy.

It was a really bad beginning.

Two people had escaped, meaning that the secret of their Fifty-fifth Earth as well as the information about their group would certainly reach the ears of those from other planes.

But since the matter had already reached this point, everyone could only accept facts as they were.

"How can you still ask that? Just put him to death," Coiling Tiger said ruthlessly. The barbarian race possessed greatest hatred toward traitors, especially people like Ye Qing and his group who had tried to play with the fate of all of the humanity.

But not everyone was as straight as Coiling Tiger. At this instant, many others had indecisive expressions on their faces, showing that there were different opinions about how to deal with Ye Qing.

"He certainly must die. However, since Divine Religion had planned for so long, I think they should know something about the main world which we're not aware of. I suggest that we all interrogate him. Perhaps we might gain some unexpected harvests," Ruyan Lanshi suggested.

She glanced slightly towards Xie Qianxue and then Li Yunmu.

Strictly speaking, the reason why they could turn the situation this time was because of these two people. Zhan Wuya clearly understood this point and immediately said, "In order to be fair, we should interrogate him publicly. However, this time, the situation was reversed because of our Central Continent's people. Therefore, the final say regarding Ye Qing's fate should also be taken by the people of the Central Continent."

Once Zhan Wuya's said that, the atmosphere within the group became muddled.

"Zhan Wuya, what do you mean? We are all from the same earth, thus we should advance and retreat jointly. Since Divine Religion knew about some secrets of the origin world, we as one group should all hear about it," Mammoth Barbarian Wuhang said calmly.

"That's right, Ye Qing's fate as well as the secrets he hides, every one of us should be qualified to learn about them," Zhao Mei, the rogue female fluxer, said without retreating in the slightest.

At her side were Xiye Hanbei, Fan Kon, as well as two other rogue descenders, vaguely forming a faction.

When everyone secretly glanced at them, they were somewhat startled. At some point in time, the rogue fluxers had all grouped together around Xiye Hanbei, forming a faction whose strength couldn't be ignored.

Xiye Hanbei, Fan Kong, and even Zhao Mei—none of them were weak. Soon, the atmosphere in the place changed.

Not far from them, Man Tian, Mammoth Barbarian Wuhang, Coiling Tiger, Tyrant Jiang, who had shown unprecedented unity, were genuinely acting as one.

They all belonged to the Barbarian Continent and were all disciples of Barbarian Kings. They were acting in great coordination, and each of them was extremely formidable, making them a great power.

On Hai Yue's side, there was a nearly three meter tall person as well as two youths who were around twenty years old, forming another faction.

Apart from that, Higher Dimensional Continent's Devil Blade was standing alone, emitting a pressure which seemed to convey that strangers shouldn't come closer. He was silently reclining against a tree.

Lu Bu and Ruyan Lanzhi as well as a person from the Dong Clan of the Higher Dimensional Continent, together with a girl who had a green serpent coiling around her arm, had also come together at some point of time.

They weren't too far from Devil Blade, but weren't standing together. It gave off a feeling that the Higher Dimensional Continent had divided into two factions. They didn't seem to be cooperating, but didn't seem to have completely broken contact, either.

As for Northern Continent, because of Huan Beichen going missing, their strength had undoubtedly weakened. Their faction had two men and two women, but none of them was an Overlord.

However, since they could reach this stage, their strength was definitely extraordinary. Still, losing Huan Beichen, the disciple of Frontline God, had left them the weakest of all factions.

Li Yunmu and Xie Qianxue glanced at each other. Both of them could feel that after escaping the suppression zone, the feeling of unity within their large group had gradually disappeared.

Especially at this instant, when Zhan Wuya gave the authority over Ye Qing's fate to Central Continent's faction in a domineering fashion. It provoked an intense backlash from the other five major factions.

After all, given that there wasn't anyone from Divine Religion, Central Continent had the biggest and most formidable faction.

It had Zhan Wuya, Ji Wuxin, Li Yunmu, Xiye Qianxue as well as Luo Tian, who had yet to speak. Furthermore, this kind of naming didn't even include the two followers behind Li Yunmu, Li Qinghong and Demon.

Thus, the faction of Central Continent had seven people in total! This made it the biggest faction in terms of the amount of members, and their power .

chapters.title: Chapter 294: Real Dragon
chapters.body:
Chapter 294: Real Dragon

Chapter 294: Real Dragon

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

Central Continent's group had seven people.

Zhan Wuya and Ji Wuxin were outstanding disciples of War God Temple and possessed unfathomable strength. This was all that was needed to be said about them.

As for Luo Tian, although he had been meticulously trying to hide his existence, no one had truly ignored him, because he represented the royalty of the Central Continent.

Luo Tian was related to the royal power of the Central Continent. With this sort of background, even if he just stood at the corner at the dragon's tail and been silent all the time, no one would miss his existence.

What concerned Xie Qianxue, she hadn't been cultivating for a long time and didn't have formidable strength, but she was in possession of a three sun heavenly world. In other words, she was a high mountain herself, but by relying on the world power of a three sun heavenly world, she could take the position of an invincible peak.

Previously, when all of them had been under the formidable pressure, she had surpassed Man Tian and caught Ye Qing. This performance clearly proved the existence of a heavenly world which turned her into a "transcendent" among the descenders.

However, Central Continent had the same problem as the Higher Dimensional Continent. Its people were separated into two or even three factions. Zhan Wuya, Ji Wuxin, and Luo Tian formed one faction. Li Yunmu with his two followers formed another, while Xie Qianxue alone formed the third faction.

This was the inherent nature of humans.

The six transcending powers and the six continents, not only the descenders but even the quasi deities above them, hadn't united until the threat of Heavenly Transformation begun to loom in front of them.

This made it foreordained that this group of people could never be unified as well.

The most important thing was that this group of descenders were not only divided by the conflicts between their native continents, but no one among the thirty-one of them possessed sufficient strength to suppress others and become the leader.

Thus from the beginning, Li Yunmu was fully aware that the cooperation between the descenders was in a worse state than a handful of loose sand. However, as long as there weren't any internal struggles, he would be more than fine.

Since the matter had reached this state, Li Yunmu didn't say anything and kept coldly observing, because the conflict regarding who gets to decide Ye Qing's fate had finally happened.

Fortunately, he had been mentally prepared long ago and hadn't had much hope that this group of so called comrades would be able to form a successful alliance.

"As I see, night has already fallen. None of us are familiar with our surroundings, so I suggest that we should find a place to rest first and tomorrow we can continue with questioning Ye Qing. As for the decision regarding his fate, since Divine Religion's plan had been foiled by Brother Li while Ye Qing had been caught by Xie Qianxue, then tomorrow, the final decision should be made by them."

The seagod's people could be considered as the least argumentative. Hai Yue suggested for the parties involved to take care of it, taking the middle ground between two extremes.

When everyone thought about it, they agreed that this was the best option they had and could only drop the subject.

Furthermore, Hai Yue's suggestion was within the limits of what everyone could accept. They could understand well that she indirectly implied that the final decision over Ye Qing's fate should be taken by Li Yunmu and Xie Qianxue and not the Central Continent's faction as Zhan Wuya had wanted.

Everyone could see that Li Yunmu and the two disciples of War God Temple didn't appear to be on friendly terms, and Xie Qianxue also didn't seem to have any intentions of getting close to Zhan Wuya.

The suggestion had surprised the group for a abit, but then they all accepted it.

Something that didn't skip anyone's mind was that by leaving the decision in the hands of Li Yunmu and Xie Qianxue, they could probably drive a wedge between the Central Continent's formidable faction, since it didn't seem to be completely united.

This was good, since it had seven people and none of them were weak, which caused anxiousness to other factions.

With both sides reaching an agreement, everyone began to set their camps to rest and prepare for tomorrow.

Today's descent to the origin world had been extremely exhausting for everyone. The unknown but formidable suppression had caused all these proud sons and daughters of heavens to exhaust their strength while crawling for more than half a day, putting them in a difficult position.

Because of Hai Yue's reminder, everyone recalled the terror of the origin world and instantly exercised restraint, taking a step back. Although Zhan Wuya was still dissatisfied, he wasn't foolish enough to offend Li Yunmu and Xie Qianxue, who were on his side, so he could only drop this matter for now.

At night, everyone took turns to keep watch, and the night passed calmly. Early in the morning of the second day, everyone discovered that the during the entire night, the unfamiliar jungle had been completely peaceful.

Not an insect had bothered them, let alone some ferocious beasts. But soon, the peaceful morning was broken by Zhao Mei's loud cry.

Everyone was vigilant and rushed out of their camps.

"What's the matter?"

Blade Devil's strength was clearly among the greatest in this group. He was the first one to reach the woman, and Zhao Mei foolishly pointed her finger toward the area behind her tent without saying anything.

Everyone looked in that direction and were instantly stunned.

This group of Flux Disciples which formed the top layer of the hierarchy of Flux Disciples in all the six continents had seen all kinds of stuff, but at this instant, they were all shocked by what they seeing, to the extent that all of them turned speechless for a long time.

Even Li Yunmu felt his mind exploding. In front of everyone's gazes, several kilometers away, there was a shimmering mountain range made of obsidian.

The mountain peak they had witnessed yesterday was just the tip of the iceberg, the real thing was far more enormous. But with just one careful glance in the daylight, everyone discovered that it wasn't a mountain range, but a motherf*cking corpse of an enormous black dragon.

"My god, is this a real dragon? It is really a dragon..." Men Shen who had followed behind Hai Yue murmured incessantly in his thick accent, which reached everyone's ears.

"It really is a real dragon."

"But it's already dead…"

Everyone was incredibly shocked—they hadn't expected that just after descending to the origin world, they would encounter such a terrifying supernatural being from the legends. Even if it was only a corpse which had been lying among the mountains and fields for who knows how long, it was still something to behold.

"A world where even deities can perish."

For Li Yunmu and others, this scene brought terror of the origin world to their hearts.

What sort of world was this where even gods could perish. It surpassed all of their understanding. The black dragon was like an enormous mountain range extending toward the north. Of the creature, they could barely see several tens of kilometers, and that was just the tail.

They could only see the tail.

Then how large exactly was this dragon? Several hundred kilometers or maybe even a thousand kilometers? Can a creature really grow to this stage?

None of them had the answer, because in their world, even the most terrifying quasi deity sage beast was only a hundred meter long and was known as Abyss Sage Python. It had required three battle sages to work together to force it to flee to the Seventh Dimension.

However, comparing that Abyss Sage Python to this dragon corpse was like comparing an enormous mountain to an earthworm.

chapters.title: Chapter 295: Ye Qing'S Sudden Death
chapters.body:
Chapter 295: Ye Qing'S Sudden Death

Chapter 295: Ye Qing's Sudden Death

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

"Ocean Temple has a record about the Emperor of Sea, Neptune. According to the records, even Neptune's deity level beast ocean dragon was only one kilometer long, but compared to this dragon corpse…"

Hai Yue had nothing to say.

Ocean Temple indeed had a record that there was a True God had existed at one point in time. And Seagod Neptune was exactly this True God. Strictly speaking, Seagod Neptune wasn't a human but a life-form native to the Seventh Dimension.

There was evidence which indicated that several thousands of years ago, many ancient deity level life-forms existed in the Seventh Dimension. This was also the reason why the seagod's people were called new humans.

All of them could be considered the descendants of Seagod Neptune who had come from the Seventh Dimension and established themselves in the abyss of earth's oceans. Therefore, seagod's people were actually half human life-forms which came to be after the descendants of the seagod had reproduced with humans during the Dark Ages.

Therefore, Hai Yue's words mentioning the achievements of Seagod Neptune caused everyone to tremble.

The deity level ocean dragon which had been dominated by the seagod wasn't larger than a kilometer, but this dragon corpse was several hundred or even a thousand kilometers long. Compared to the deities and gods in their imagination, wasn't this… None of them dared to think beyond this point.

No one knew how to describe the disparity among the two creatures, for they couldn't even understand how a life-form surpassing deities and gods could even exist.

This experience had already surpassed the world in their imagination by far. At this time, all of them, including Li Yunmu, learned that their world was just a well and they were only frogs at the bottom of that well.

"According to the records of our Barbarian Shrine, our majestic Barbarian God had been several hundred meters tall and had boundless divine power, enough to throw a mountain, but compared to this…"

Man Tian was also dumbfounded. He suddenly the firm faith of the barbarians in their Barbarian God collapse within him.

But when others heard the descriptions of Barbarian God and Seagod Neptune by Man Tian and Hai Yue, a strange type of excitement appeared in their eyes.

At this instant, Li Yunmu understood everything.

No wonder the quasi deities had disregarded everything in their desire to descend to origin world. How could the origin world only have a path leading to become deities; it certainly had an unimaginable heavenly way which was even more eternal and went farther.

Battle God, Barbarian King, Ocean Emperor, quasi deities?

It wasn't that they didn't have path to move on, but it was just the beginning. Only the beginning ahh. Even this dragon corpse which had been lying here for countless years had made them crawl for the several kilometers just by its remanent pressure.

Unimaginable, what sort of world is this exactly?

Yesterday, everyone was still fighting about who would make the final decision regarding Ye Qing's fate, but at this instant, they discovered that their vision had been too narrow, too small.

They were like ants who were noisily bickering because a human had accidently dropped bread crumbs. It was completely ridiculous.

"I've decided to travel the world alone. We all will meet here after three years, this insignia will act as proof."

Blade Devil suddenly gave a blade insignia to Higher Dimensional Continent's Ruyan Lanzhi, then without talking to anyone, he started on his journey alone and left through the south side of the jungle.

Blade Devil caused everyone to turn speechless. Although all of them had received a psychological blow, not all of them were as confident as Blade Devil, nor had the powers behind them been so thorough and courageous like Bladewood. They bore the hopes of the powers and sects who had supported them while descending, so how could they just disregard everything like Devil Blade and walk away.

Thus, apart from him, everyone else remained behind.

The dragon corpse had dealt a psychological blow to all of the group, causing the minds of the majority of people here to change. But as to what to do and how to accomplish anything, everyone decided to base their plans on the information they'd extract from the traitor of Divine Religion.

These so called descenders had now discovered that they had too little information about this origin world. Even if they had to compete like ridiculous ants, they still should do so only when necessary.

As for Fan Qing and the others, they were the breakthrough which everyone needed.

"Speak, tell us what your Divine Religion has learned about the origin world. If you speak, we will give you an easy death."

Once Blade Devil left, Zhan Wuya breathed a sigh of relief and became much more confident.

Among all the descenders, Blade Devil was the only one whose existence made others anxious. Now that this troublesome person had left, while Zhan Wuya had Ji Wuxin by his side as well as Luo Tian who had been silently acting invisible, he became increasingly more courageous.

"Get lost. Kill me if you want, but none of you will be able to learn anything about this origin world."

However, what was out of everyone's expectations was that Ye Qing, whom everyone held in absolute contempt, acted with extreme firmness at this instant. All while his gaze filled with resentment and anger was fixated on Li Yunmu.

Just because of this person, the great plan of their Divine Religion had been foiled again and again. Regardless of whether it was Chaotian Sect trying to obtain Void Disk previously or him trying to rush through the tower to obtain the final part of Refining Pagoda later on, he always showed up to get in their way.

No one could've thought that a majestic transcending power would be dragged down into the quagmire of despair because of one trifling character.

Everyone took turns to interrogate Ye Qing, using all sorts of methods, but he remained silent. The only thing in his eyes apart from resentment was even more intense resentment.

It was clear to him that Divine Religion as well as Chaotian Sect were finished on the other side, while after falling in the hands of these people, he was also doomed to die.

Since there was no hope for him, how could he easily give up the information accumulated by Divine Religion during the countless years to this group of people. He was full of despair and his heart was dead.

Whatever torture methods they used proved to be useless. But when he was at his last gasp after being tortured, a strange light flickered in his eyes. "If-if you kill Li Yunmu for me, I will reveal all the secrets Divine Religion had learned about this origin world, even the method to return to our Earth…"

As he said these words, his eyes suddenly bulged out.

"Li Qinghong, have you gone crazy?"

"What did you kill him for?"

At this instant, Zhan Wuya and even other descenders went completely crazy, especially when they heard Ye Qing's final words of knowing how to return to their Earth.

When they heard him say that, their hearts immediately tightened. But at this crucial moment, who could've anticipated that Li Qinghong, one o Li Yunmu's followers, would suddenly attack and kill him.

She had stabbed her spear into Ye Qing's back. This one stab instantly reached his heart and her flux energy crushed his heart into pieces, killing him on the spot.

Facing everyone's fury, Li Qinghong indifferently said, "A world traitor, a deserter of humanity dares to cause strife among us before breathing his last? He deserved to die."

She then slowly withdrew her Frightening Imperial Spear and retreated behind Li Yunmu.

As for him, cold sweat was pouring down his body at this moment. Fortunately, Li Qinghong had managed to respond quickly and killed Ye Qing while everyone was in daze after hearing his words.

Otherwise, today, he might've been finished. If Ye Qing hadn't died, this group of people would've really attacked him.

Li Yunmu truly hadn't expected that this Ye Qing would be so determined to drag him to hell. Honestly speaking, although Li Yunmu was ruthless, he still lacked a little bit of resolve.

Fortunately, Li Qinghong had killed Ye Qing, and now that the person was dead, all problems were over.

"What? The conspiracy laid down by the Divine Religion was stopped by me, yet don't tell me that you would've went all out to kill me for a world traitor?"

When Li Yunmu saw Zhan Wuya, Man Tian, Xiye Hanbei and others rushing forth towards Li Qinghong, he instantly moved in front of her and said coldly, "Is this the unity the quasi deities spoke of?"

chapters.title: Chapter 296: Flux Ancestor Perishes
chapters.body:
Chapter 296: Flux Ancestor Perishes

Chapter 296: Flux Ancestor Perishes

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

After Li Yunmu indifferently asked that question, Zhan Wuya and others' faces turned unsightly, almost as if he had hit the nail and brought to the open the concealed schemes in everyone's heart.

"Everyone, I believe Sister Qinghong promptly killing him was quite correct. Clearly, this Ye Qing wanted to drive a wedge among us before dying. As for his words that he knew a way to return, I don't believe him," Zhongshan Anling said suddenly.

"That's right, I feel that him dying was the best outcome for all of us. In my opinion, this is fair to everyone and now we can get back to our proper business. Don't forget, that the two deserters have already fled."

Li Yunmu had to accept that not every descender was like Zhan Wuya, ready to fight at the slightest hint of conflict. Zhongshan Anling, Xie Qianxue, and even Lu Bu came forward in Li Yunmu's support.

Hai Yue, on the other hand, was still acting as the middleman, trying to mediate between the two sides.

Finally, Zhan Wuya and others had to unwillingly let this matter go.

"Let's go, we should move towards the south."

The entire northern side was occupied by the dragon corpse resembling an enormous mountain range, leaving behind only a few directions to pick from.

After settling the matters, the group of descenders finally began to move. This lasted for more than two months.

Even if the descenders had formidable mental fortitude, but almost all of them were bewildered, thinking that they would never be able to walk out of this enormous jungle.

During this time, everyone hastened on with their journey. They would rush through the jungle and hunt animals which were in abundance when they got hungry. Thus they didn't lack food, while as for water, everyone had stored sufficient purified water, not to mention that they still had micro water purifying devices in their fluxer badge.

In this enormous jungle which didn't lack moisture, they didn't have to worry about shortage of food or water.

After getting sufficient rest, they would continue with their journey. In this way, while walking through this enormous jungle where there was no sunlight or any vestiges of human habitat for two months, the group had turned completely silent, rushing through their journey day after day.

Who could've expected that this jungle would surpass their imagination. Given the speed at which they were moving, even if they couldn't cover a thousand kilometer each day, they would certainly cover at least several hundred.

But even then, during this journey of two months, some of them who lacked willpower begun to wonder if they had entered an illusionary land once again.

Fortunately, everyone continued to persevere for two months, and then finally the hope appeared before them—the surrounding trees began to grow sparse.

What did this imply?

Everyone was clear that the great change in surroundings meant that the exit of the jungle was close.

At this moment, everyone was finally able to collect their thoughts and calm down, although astonishment still filled their hearts. Just to transverse this jungle, they had to travel for two whole months. Considering that they covered seven hundred kilometers every day, then in nearly three months, they had traversed around twenty thousand something kilometers.

This distance was equivalent to the distance between two corners of their Earth. However, here they had only exited the jungle after covering so much distance?

In other words, the length of this enormous jungle in the origin world was almost equivalent to their earth's diameter?

The majority of the group didn't dare to believe it, but they had no choice but to accept this incredulous fact. At this point, everyone recalled the enormous dragon corpse and realized something.

Perhaps only such a world whose enormity cannot be fathomed could nurture such a terrifyingly enormous life-form.

After adapting and experiencing the past few months, this group of descenders which included the proud sons and daughters of heavens finally lost the arrogance which was inherent to their nature.

Perhaps all of them could be considered as extremely talented in their world, but here even the disciples of War God Temple like Zhan Wuya had to restrain their innate tendency to act superior.

Because here, they were nothing.

Everyone clenched their teeth and continued to advance in the same direction. After advancing for two more days, the blue sky filled with clouds appeared in front of them once more. Seeing this, all of them couldn't help but rejoice and quickly walk out.

Once they did so, a heavy pressure suddenly forced everyone to bend their backs. Their complexions changed, and all of them thought that they had encountered another formidable life-form, like the dragon's corpse.

However, this time it was too serious.

All of them made some slight adjustments and looked at each other with gazes filled with shock. This wasn't a suppression but gravity, the pull exerted by the world.

"It's at least several tens of times greater than our Earth's gravity," Xiye Hanbei said coldly. He fiercely brought out his strength and began to straighten his body. But those descenders who had slightly weaker physical body were finding it quite hard to even breath at this moment.

"Are you both all right?"

Li Yunmu became apprehensive inwardly. It was completely out of his expectations that this enormous jungle might actually be blocking this sort of enormous gravitational pull.

Currently, everyone seemed to have reached some sort of agreement to remain silent about this descending region.

None of them was a fool. They had an increasingly greater sensation that this enormous jungle was quite unique and mystical, and they were now completely certain that the dragon corpse was part of the Black Dragon Island in their world.

The Black Dragon Island in their world wasn't truly an island, but rather a real dragon, and the descending passage was the endpoint of the dragon's tail.

This was an enormous life-form stretching across the origin world to the Fifty-fifth Earth. After the flux ancestor had discovered something unique about that place, he used his full strength to open a descending passage for the humanity.

But unfortunately, after the thirty-four people descended, the descending point at the dragon's tail closed because the flux ancestor didn't have the strength to maintain it any longer.

In other words, the youths that went down had lost the path to return back to their world. Perhaps after a few years, the flux ancestor could restore his power through the Tower of Glory and this descending passage would be opened again.

However, Li Yunmu and the others weren't aware of a very important fact at this moment.

After they had left the Earth and descended into the origin world, an event occurred which shook all of the six continents—fluxer association's Tower of Glory collapsed.

One after another, a cobweb of enormous cracks appeared on its surface, after which the Tower of Glory shattered like an ordinary building and collapsed completely.

Soon after, the headquarters of the fluxer association, which contained the heavenly world of the flux ancestor, also began to collapse.

Violent winds, hellfire, thunder, poison mist, and many other calamities appeared without any source, and cracks appeared everywhere in the heavenly world. The entire reserve force of the fluxer association, whether they were Flux Masters or Flux Sages, couldn't escape this catastrophe.

The seven suns of the flux ancestor's heavenly world began to fall down one after another, each landing with a heaven-shaking explosion.

This day was remembered as the day when flux ancestor perished. Flux ancestor had died! And his heavenly world collapsed along with him.

No one, including Divine Religion, had expected that Ye Qing's action of destroying the five transcending sage tools to use Void Displacement could be so influential even when failing to accomplish its goal. Although the Black Dragon Island hadn't been affected, the flux ancestor perished.

With more than thirty people descending at the same time, the flux ancestor had completely exhausted the world power of his heavenly world and become extremely weak. Then, although Divine Religion's conspiracy to destroy the Black Dragon Island didn't succeed because of the lack of the sixth transcending treasure, but they had accidently thrown the flux ancestor into a bottomless hell.

After this event, the quasi deities spared no price to send people to the dragon's tail where the descending point had eternally disappeared. Naturally, these people found the information about the conspiracy of Divine Religion left by the descenders, and it sent the world into further chaos.

chapters.title: Chapter 297: Using All Sorts Of Methods
chapters.body:
Chapter 297: Using All Sorts Of Methods

Chapter 297: Using All Sorts Of Methods

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

Since three months had already passed by then, the group of descenders had no idea about the heaven-shaking matter and were completely unaware about the flux ancestor's fall.

At the moment, the group had just walked out of the jungle and were holding under the unnatural gravity of the origin world for the first time, which was a completely new challenge.

None of them had ever expected that after their group of most powerful fluxers descended to the origin world, they wouldn't be fighting with the natives of the origin world and the descenders from other Earths, but would have to spend lots of time miserably adapting to their new surroundings.

And the first thing they had to face was the terrifying gravity of the origin world.

People like Xiye Hanbei, Man Tian, Coiling Tiger, Li Yunmu, and the others who possessed tyrannical bodies were still doing good. Although the sudden increase in the gravitational pull by several tens of folds was quite uncomfortable, at least they could still support themselves.

But the rest of the descenders weren't so fortunate, especially those who lacked strength and didn't possess a sufficiently formidable flesh. At the instant they walked out of the jungle by the dragon's corpse, the increase in gravity was a catastrophe to them. Although it wasn't as frightening as the suppression by the dragon's might, but under the powerful gravity, some of these people soon found it difficult to move even one step.

Among them were the three people of the Northern Continent. Apart from Zhongshan Anling, who could persevere for half a moment, the blood circulation of others was swiftly obstructed and their faces turned deathly pale.

All of them lost consciousness and fell on the ground one after another.

Before long, the girl with the green serpent and Ruyan Lanzhi from the Higher Dimensional Continent also began to feel the pressure. Both of them were women so they had an innate resistance against tempering and cultivating their flesh.

Thus, they were also on the verge of collapsing under the pressure of the omnipresent gravity.

Hai Yue also wasn't an exception. However, the three meter tall Men Shen who had been protecting her all along was quite easily resisting against the pressure.

Thud.

Just when everyone thought that Hai Yue won't be able to persevere anymore, she took out an indigo pearl whose surface was flickering with ocean blue light from her storage badge.

She performed some rites by placing this pearl on top of her head, and her body, which was originally tottering, surprisingly became stable. Ocean Temple's holy daughter sure enough had great resources at her disposal.

When someone recognized this indigo pearl, they couldn't help but shout out, "Underworld Ocean Sage Pearl."

Once everyone heard this name, their minds were instantly shaken. No one had expected that Ocean Temple would surprisingly prepare such a pearl for Hai Yue when she went to descend.

The name of underworld ocean is generally used to describe an area that has a certain depth in the ocean. It is roughly thirty thousand kilometers. This depth is considered as underworld ocean's border.

Before the Dark Ages, the ocean's depths didn't extend to the underworld ocean line, but after the turmoil caused by the continental slabs because of the Dimensional Shooting Star, this region came into being.

In short, the strength of the sea beasts so deep in the ocean had evolved to sage layer. They all possess a common characteristic, and that is that their corporeal bodies are unusually dense and extremely enormous in size.

Thus, ordinary people came to call these types of sea beasts as underworld ocean beasts, all of whom are sage layer beasts. In the six continents, the evolved sage layer beasts had been exterminated long ago, with just a few of them remaining as sect guardians here and there.

But within the boundless oceans, there are many underworld ocean sage beasts.

The source of the Underworld Ocean Sage Pearl is actually the inner dan of the underworld ocean monsters who had evolved to become existences equivalent to battle sages.

Each of them is more terrifying than a human battle sage, thus Ocean Temple giving the Underworld Ocean Sage Pearl to Hai Yue was really a huge investment.

This is because the underworld ocean sage beasts are even more difficult to kill than human battle sages.

"I'm alright, you should quickly check on the others."

After catching her breath, Hai Yue immediately pulled the people who were unable to resist against the earth's gravity into the area shielded by her Underworld Ocean Sage Pearl.

This item naturally had an area shield which was as magnificent as the domain produced by Domain Sages, or maybe was even more formidable.

At this instant, Li Yunmu finally experienced the profound reserves of the transcending powers, especially Ocean Temple which had always existed at the bottom of the ocean. Just this one pearl had completely stunned everyone.

After some time, Ruyan Lanzhi also woke up. Suddenly she took out numerous seventh dimensional talismans and put them on her chest.

Instantly, color returned to her deathly pale cheeks. Although her forehead was still filled with beads of sweat, she could now resist against the gravity by herself.

"This is the seventh dimensional weight reduction talismans from the Seventh Dimension?"asked Xiye Hanbei, his eyes narrowed. Unexpectedly, he had recognized this talisman used by Ruyan Lanzhi.

"Yes, it can weaken the gravitational pull by roughly thirty times."

Seeing that this treasure talisman had been recognized by someone, Ruyan Lanzhi confidently acknowledged it.

The seventh dimensional weight reduction seal which she held might be far less precious than the Underworld Ocean Sage Pearl, but it was still an extraordinary item, and the most important fact was that it was just the right medicine for their current problem.

With the thirty times reduced gravity, Ruyan Lanzhi could at least maintain consciousness by relying on her own strength.

However, Xiye Hanbei's faction wasn't as fortunate as Hai Yue who had the Underworld Ocean Supreme Sage Pearl or Ruyan Lanzhi with her seventh dimensional weight reduction talisman.

Zhao Mei, Fan Kong, as well as the other two fluxers who belonged to the faction of rogue cultivators soon began to bleed from the seven apertures.

In fact, these people without any profound backgrounds and who had reached this place just by relying on their own strength could already be considered as terrifying, but if they didn't possess any tricks up their sleeve, they could only rely on Hai Yue.

If they relied on her, then this rogue faction under the lead of Xiye Hanbei would naturally collapse and Hai Yue would make the biggest profit from this.

As for Xiye Hanbei, he would follow in Zhongshan Anling's footsteps and would soon find it very difficult to advance. But at this time, a ruthless expression suddenly appeared on Zhao Mei's face, who was holding onto two flying knives.

She quickly stabbed them into her own body.

"Seven Point Extinction Stabbing Technique."

She clenched her teeth in extreme agony. Her hands flashed with extreme speed, and in the blink of an eye, she had recklessly stabbed her knives into forty-nine flux points of her body, according to a fixed sequence and method.

In less than three seconds, she had stabbed forty-nine knives, completing the point stabbing technique which was as ruthless towards her as anyone else. As a result, it could be clearly felt that Zhao Mei's strength was rising.

Unexpectedly, she had utilized the unfathomable stabbing point technique to increase her strength.

"Benefactor Sister Zhao, good trick, seems like Fan Kong also will have to show some ability."

Fan Kong was also bleeding from the seven apertures. This ascetic cultivator's true strength was deep and unmeasurable, and he was the other half of the pair of dark horses.

He was clearly more proficient in the cultivation of soul strength, but the strength of his physical body was a weakness which couldn't be ignored. Zhao Mei's method had finally prompted him to harden his resolve, and he took out a small golden pill.

His expression flickered once, and he swallowed it. Immediately, his skin transformed. As if gold had been sprinkled all over his body, he became a golden-bodied human.

"What sort of trickery is this?"

Fan Kong's transformation not only shocked all the descenders, but Li Yunmu as well. He had never heard or seen anything like it.

[Host, if the system hasn't guessed wrong, then the pill he ate should be the Golden Body Arhat Pill. According to legends, this pill is a body tempering pill which was lost during the Dark Ages.]

chapters.title: Chapter 298: Division At The Very Start
chapters.body:
Chapter 298: Division At The Very Start

Chapter 298: Division at the Very Start

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

It has to be said that the amount of data stored in the system at this time was just too large. Even Hai Yue and Zhan Wuya, these people from transcending powers, didn't recognize the small golden pill used by Fan Kong, but the system surprisingly had some information about it.

This difference was naturally because of the large amount of data gathered by the system. It wouldn't be the slightest exaggeration to say that it was currently like a super large scale database.

Any information that found its way on the online network, regardless of whether it was public or encrypted, would be stored by the system. If one line was used to describe this, then the system with its large amount of data was equivalent to a super large scale library or maybe was even something greater.

Thus, the Golden Body Arhat Pill used by Fan Kong was recognized by the system at one glance.

Sure enough, after swallowing the Golden Body Arhat Pill, Fan Kong's presence completely transformed. His body lost the air of calmness from before and instead began to emit an extremely valiant presence.

After this transformation, he could surprisingly stand firm under the effect of this origin world's strong gravity and, from the looks of it, he could endure it better than Ruyan Lanzhi who was using the seventh dimensional weight reduction talisman.

Fan Kong certainly wasn't just a simple rogue fluxer. Once he displayed his trump cards, many descenders instantly became more cautious of him.

From the analysis of the system, Li Yunmu knew that the origin world's gravity was sixty-six times that of their world. This number was identical to the number of parallel Earth planes, as for whether that was just a coincidence or not, that was unknown.

However, with Li Yunmu's Tyrant Body having reached the minor threshold coupled with the Devil Dragon Bone Refining, although he wasn't very comfortable, he was definitely the one who felt the most relaxed in this situation.

There was no need to speak of barely resisting the gravity when he even had surplus energy to burst forth into a sprint. Naturally, this sort of power was substantially weakened under the sixty-six times greater gravity of this origin world.

Zhao Mei and Fan Kong had both revealed their trump cards, but the other two rogue fluxers didn't have any such cards up their sleeves. They were completely clear about their abilities and rushed into the shield of Hai Yue's Underworld Ocean Sage Pearl.

But the person who shocked everyone was Demon. No one had expected that he would be able to resist this gravity, have some methods to deal with it. This was his first time revealing his true strength to others.

When Demon was on the verge of collapsing under the gravity, he loudly yelled out with his head bowed down, and the next instant, the clothes on his upper body were destroyed and a halo of sinister black air began to be emitted from his entire body.

Demon thus for the first time revealed his ghost king bloodline.

That's right, after he switched to become a member of the Ghost Clan, he could display the true from of Ghost King Body Refining Secrets. At that moment, his height instantly increased to two meters from his original one hundred and eighty centimeters.

The pupils of his eyes turned into two dim lamplights, and his the shadows under his eyes instantly became deep black, while among his teeth, a pair of ghost king tooth sprouted out.

Once ghost king mode was activated, Demon was immediately able to resist the gravity of the origin world.

"Ghost Clan's Ghost King bloodline."

Zhan Wuya recognized Demon's transformation, and his gaze immediately flickered to Li Yunmu. Evidently, the strength displayed by Li Yunmu's followers had always surpassed his conjectures.

As for Li Qinghong, this woman had extremely firm and indomitable resolve, like a female battle god, so she simply didn't use any methods to face the gravity.

Even if her body was unable to endure the sixty-six times higher gravity and began to bleed from the seven apertures, after which the veins and arteries in her body began to rupture, followed by successive echoes of numerous bones breaking in her body, she still didn't utter half a world.

Suddenly, a flame took form in her stomach, and the projection of the Sungod bird appeared around her. Everyone saw that her body which had been on the verge of collapsing under the heavy pressure began to recover quickly after it was enveloped within this flame.

After this, Li Qinghong's body continuously crumbled and constantly recovered. She clenched her teeth tightly and endured everything without saying anything.

But everyone quickly discovered that while experiencing the endless loop of destruction and rebirth, she began to adapt quickly to the origin world's gravity.

Sungod bird's undying sage blood! When the group recognized it, jealousy appeared in the eyes of people like Ji Wuxin or Man Tian. They knew that Sungod bird's blood wasn't any ordinary sage beast's blood. This property of not letting the user die was clearly a huge trump card.

If everyone didn't know that sungod bird's undying sage blood was extremely particular about being compatible with a person's body constitution, then Li Qinghong would've become everyone's target long ago.

After all descenders had walked out of the forest, the origin world's initial might had caught them completely off guard. Apart from Li Yunmu, Xiye Hanbei, Zhongshan Anling, Zhan Wuya, Ji Wuxin, Lu Bu, Luo Tian, and Men Shen were the only ones to resist the gravity just by the strength of their flesh.

In terms of factions, the faction of the disciples of four Barbarian Kings which included Man Tian, Coiling Tiger, Tyrant Jiang, and Mammoth Barbarian Wuhang was the one that was doing best. This was because barbarians placed great importance on tempering their bodies and would also merge with formidable bloodlines.

Xie Qianxue then allowed people to experience the formidable might of the three sun heavenly world. Even if she could only display ten percent of the heavenly world's power, she was still quite comfortable while using the world power to counter the gravity.

"What should we do now?"

By then, thirteen descenders had entered the area shield of Hai Yue, which was giving her a headache.

Although the Underworld Ocean Sage Pearl which had been refined using the inner dan of a quasi deity level sage beast was extremely formidable, it was shielding more than ten people at the same time so the rate of power consumption was also extremely high. It was clear that this pearl's shield wouldn't last for long at this rate.

"Let's return to the jungle. It'd be wrong of us to pull you back, so you all go ahead without us." Finally, one of those under the shield took the initiative to make this request after realizing this bitter but completely obvious fact.

Others who were also receiving Hai Yue's protection also subsequently expressed their agreement.

Hai Yue didn't need to say anything; these people who had received the shelter had already accepted this fact. Even if Hai Yue was willing to shield them, they still wouldn't be willing to put their lives in the hands of another.

Returning to the jungle also didn't mean that they wouldn't have any chance in the future. The origin world's terrifying gravity was both a disaster as well as an opportunity for them. Although they hadn't cultivated their flesh, it didn't mean they were weak.

If they used the assistance of the origin world to temper their flesh, their strength would advance by leaps and bounds.

Hai Yue's eyes narrowed and she finally said, "We can only do it this way."

The thirty-one descenders who had barely entered the origin world were taught a ruthless lesson by this event. Who could've thought that their group which comprised of Earth's most talented people would unexpectedly be pressured into holing up within the forest before they even had the chance to explore their surroundings.

The group of thirty-one then divided into two. After both groups settled on how to contact each other, the group of descenders who could endure the gravity departed the dragon corpse jungle with heavy hearts.

The fact worth mentioning was that among the group of seven from the Central Continent, including Li Qinghong and Demon, everyone had been able to resist the threat caused by the gravity. Thus, Central Continent's faction was now the most powerful one.

"Look, there is a small village in front of us. We can finally encounter the natives of this world."

chapters.title: Chapter 299: Boasting Villager
chapters.body:
Chapter 299: Boasting Villager

Chapter 299: Boasting Villager

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

Men Shan, who was leading the way, shouted out loudly in astonishment.

When others heard his words, their spirits were fiercely shaken. Had they finally come across people? Many people immediately walked faster to take a look.

And sure enough, Men Shen, who had been clearing the path, hadn't hallucinated. They'd been trapped within the mountain range for half a year, and now they had walked out of that damned place.

Yes, after the group of thirty-one descenders had divided into two groups at the jungle, the vanguard went up one mountain after another. To the point that the damned mountain range started to seem endless.

In time, all of them had turned completely numb. They lost track of how far they had come and how many mountains they had crossed. All that mattered now was that they had finally come out of this long mountain range.

Within the last half a year, everyone had fully accepted the enormity of the origin world.

Previously, they had tried to use their wing armor to hasten their journey by flying, but it wasn't a good idea. They soon discovered that under the terrifying gravity of the origin world, even Li Yunmu with his Wings of the Wind was unable to stay in the air for long and was forced to come down, let alone people with normal wing armor.

The terror and mysteries of the origin world gave several psychological blows to the group.

They had to walk for three months to cross the jungle, then after they came out, they had to cross the mountain range which took another three months.

Just when they thought that they had walked into some sort of illusion, that the mountain range was endless, they encountered signs of human habitat, which reinvigorated their spirits.

Since there were humans, then it meant that they had come out of the wilderness, even if Men Shen had only discovered a small village.

"Let's go, we will take a look."

No one hesitated to advance toward the small mountain within the desolate mountain range. From top to bottom, it only had ten or so households. It was clear at first glance that this was the lowest rung place in the origin world.

Thus, everyone immediately rushed forward.

During the three months of resisting the sixty-six greater gravity, each one of them had progressed at an extraordinary speed. Among them, Li Qinghong's progress was the greatest.

Presently, she could completely rely on her physical body to endure the gravity of the origin world.

"Elder, may I ask which region is this?"

Ji Wuxin acted as the representative and enquired from an old man in the small village.

"This is Liujia village, you all… did you all come from the mountain range in the north?"

The old man sized up the group of descenders which had appeared suddenly with a wisp of amazement in his eyes.

"That's right, we've been lost there for a long time."

"Can I ask the lot of you to follow this old man?"

Seeing the group of suddenly appeared descenders, the old man wasn't astonished in the slightest. While walking on the path leading inside the village, he mumbled to himself, "Recent times have been getting increasingly more strange. These days, many misters and misses have been coming from the northern mountain range."

All the fluxers had a keen hearing ability. Coiling Tiger grabbed the old man's shoulder and asked with excitement, "Uncle what did you say just now?"

"I said more and more people are coming from the northern mountains." The old man then continued as if he was accustomed to it, ""Everyone please, I know what you want. My Liujia Village has already prepared everything, so I have just one request - that you should leave after taking the things you want. Truthfully, our Liujia Village has been struggling painfully for the past generations, we have nothing which can catch your eye."

The old man then turned again with a helpless expression, leading everyone toward the village.

"Increasingly more and more people like us have been coming from the northern mountains?"

All of the fluxers looked at each other in dismay. Hai Yue ,who was extremely careful, discovered that although this old man looked extremely weak, when Coiling Tiger had grabbed his shoulder forcefully in a fit of excitement, the old man hadn't been the slightest bit discomfied.

This wasn't because the old man was actually a deeply hidden expert or that Coiling Tiger hadn't used sufficient strength, but that the natives of this world had extremely tyrannical physical bodies.

Even an old man from a desolate region like this could resist the berserk strength of Coiling Tiger.

"All right, a few days ago, a young lord and young miss had come from there, wearing white gowns. The girl appeared to be holy and pure like a fairy and was very beautiful, although these few misses here are also equally beautiful."

While speaking, the old man turned his head and glanced at Hai Yue, Ruyan Lanzhi, and Xie Qianxue. All these three women were breathtaking beauties. Although Zhao Mei and Ji Wuxin also weren't lacking, but they were a grade lower. However, all of them were extremely beautiful, so this old man did have good taste.

When he mentioned two people, a man and a woman, two names popped up in everyone's heads - Fan En and Fan Ni.

"Where are they now?" Men Shen asked, feeling slightly aggrieved.

"They are long gone, they got a map and some rations, then left the same evening." The old man then added, "In the past few months, four groups of people had come from the northern mountains, which makes your group the fifth one."

Soon, the old man led everyone inside the village. "All of them were like you, coming to our village to enquire about directions."

While following behind the old man, the first thing that Li Yunmu and the others saw was a group of naked underaged children fighting with each other. All of them were extremely energetic, their fierce yells filled with blood and qi, which jolted everyone's ear drums.

This group that consisted of mostly eleven and twelve year old children had such sturdy muscles that even people like Man Tian and Xiye Hanbei were about to palpitate. The finally understood the real situation of the natives of this origin world who were born and raised under the sixty-six times greater gravity.

Even if they were just a group of children in a desolate land, their strength as well as power of the physical body surpassed that of most people from the group of descenders.

It wouldn't be the slightest exaggeration to say that the vitality coming from the tyrannical bodies of these children caused the hearts of these descenders to tremble in fear. Only now did Li Yunmu finally understand why when the old man had seen them first time he'd called them young masters and young ladies.

It was because among the people of this village, none of them had a weak physique. Every single one of them, whether it were adults or children or even women, all of them had extremely sturdy bodies like those of crude barbarians.

Li Yunmu and the others saw this, then got the map the old man had mentioned before, although calling it a map was showing great respect to this piece of beast skin.

On top of it, there were several crooked pictures which represented the northern mountains, Liujia Village, and Nine Dragon Cave. It had just these three points around, while far into the distance there was an image which was probably a large city.

In terms of estimated distance, that city was roughly two thousand kilometers away from this village.

When Hai Yue carefully examined the map, she couldn't help but point at a human skull shaped mark on the map and ask, "What is this Nine Dragon Cave?"

chapters.title: Chapter 300: Power Of Nine Oxen
chapters.body:
Chapter 300: Power Of Nine Oxen

Chapter 300: Power of Nine Oxen

Translator: Mercurial_ Editor: DarkGem

When Hai Yue carefully examined the map, she couldn't help but point at a human skull shaped mark on the map and ask, "What is this Nine Dragon Cave?"

Obviously, none of the descenders were ordinary folk. When they saw the blood-colored skull mark on the beast skin, a hint of alertness rose in their hearts.

"This Nine Dragon Cave is where a group of bandits—none of whom are good people—live on the Nine Dragon Mountain. My Liujia Village has to make an offering to them every three months, like every other village in a thousand kilometer radius. We can only live under their exploitation."

Once everyone heard this, their hearts stopped.

A trifling bandit group had control over a territory of a thousand kilometers?

Once again, the descenders experienced the terrifying vastness of the origin world.

"You all should leave quickly, these Nine Dragon Cave bandits aren't someone you can provoke. Outsiders like you are meaty fish in their eyes. Many people from groups that came before you have been captured by them," said a deep and crude-sounding voice.

It came from the other side of the public square, and it was full of vigor and vitality. When Li Yunmu and the others looked in the direction from which the voice had spoken, they saw a group of tall and muscular men entering the village.

They were holding thick wooden spears and had animal hides fastened around their waists. This group with an air of savageness to it had around twenty people and was led by a large, one-eyed man.

His height was surprisingly almost equal to that of the three meter tall Men Shen, while the strength emitted by him instantly almost made the eyeballs of Man Tian jump out.

According to the elder's words, these people belonged to Liujia village's hunting squad, which now returned back to the village. The leader of the squad was called Liu Qingshi, a thirty year old son of the village elder.

Behind him, the other members of the hunting squad were carrying an enormous beast which was more than ten meter long and dripping blood.

Sssss.

The group of descenders couldn't help but take in a deep breath.

At first, they hadn't bothered to put the possible threat of the hunting squad into theirs eyes. After all, what sort of people were they? They were Overlords who formed the top layer of the flux disciple hierarchy in all of the six continents, so how could they worry about a trifling hunting squad. But now, the powerful presence coming from the members of the hunting squad filled their hearts with agony.

Motherf*ckers, can this really be just a hunting squad of a village which belongs to the lowest rung of the society? The presence emitted by these people was sufficient to cause the descenders to grow apprehensive of them.

Especially the leader of the hunting squad Qingshi. His vigor suppressed Men Shen, this three meter tall human. Yet even though Liujia Village had a formidable hunting squad under the leadership of Qingshi, they were still oppressed and had to pay taxes.

Zhao Mei couldn't help but sincerely ask the group of hunters, "The Nine Dragon Cave's brigands, how formidable are they?"

Seeing her sweet smile, one member of the hunting squad instantly forgot everything and revealed all the information he had about the strength of mountain bandits, "Extremely formidable, they have more than a hundred people, and each one of them can beat three of us. Above them are the nine heads, which are known as nine dragons. The most formidable among them is the Black Dragon, and even captain Qingshi isn't his opponent."

"Yes, Old Tiger words are truthful. In the depths of the Nine Dragon Cave, there is a transfer channel. Previously, the villages around here had joined hands to rebel and were successful. But afterwards, the Black Dragon opened the transfer channel and requested the help of a group of martial experts who then suppressed us."

"Yes, those damned bandits have some backer. Every one of those experts had cultivated flux energy, so you should leave quickly, for if they meet you, you won't be able to leave anymore."

The squad members all urged the descenders to swiftly depart.

"Transfer channel?"

Although everyone was apprehensive about the strength of the natives here, all of them sighed in relief upon hearing what the members of the hunting squad had to say..

Even if the villagers described the Nine Mountain Cave's bandits as very formidable, they couldn't be too fearsome if Qingshi could rival most of the leaders, the dragon heads.

As the villagers had said, their only worry was the backer of these bandits, so Li Yunmu and the others weren't too anxious. That evening, they decided to stay in Liujia Village, especially after hearing that the trifling Nine Dragon Cave had a transfer channel.

Everyone had the same idea at that moment. They didn't mention it, but talked with the people of Liujia Village, enquiring about the origin world. From this, they soon understood that their current location was the most backward and desolate region in the origin world.

None of these villagers, including Liu Qingshi, had cultivated any flux energy, not to mention deadly flux skills. Although there were people among them who had physical strength that surpassed even that of Hai Yue, this didn't mean that they were more impressive than the descenders.

That night, everyone gathered in Hai Yue's hut as if having agreed to do so. In the center of the room, they lighted a fire, which then reflected upon the solemn expressions of every descender.

According to the information they had received from the villagers, they were too optimistic, but they also weren't full of despair.

Currently, everyone was completely clear about the reason why every villager of Liujia village whom they had run into had called them young masters and misses. And it was a really simple one.

It was all because of their slim bodies. When in this world, apart from Men Shen who was three meter tall, even Mammoth Barbarian Wuhang would be seen a young master until he changed his body when in a fight.

The elder had said that descenders' innate control over their body stature was a mark that they were descendants of martial experts. Among ordinary people, very few would have a height less than two meters under the terrifying sixty-six times greater gravity of the origin world.

In the eyes of people here, height was the mark of a person's strength. Under ordinary circumstances, the more muscular a person was, the greater his strength would be. Those who had a height of two meters were considered to be at the lowest rung in terms of strength.

Those who had a height of 2.5 m were considered to be experts, while those who surpassed 2.7 m could fight for the position of the captain of the hunting squad.

Liu Qingshi's name was famous in the villages in the vicinity. He was close to 2.9 m tall and possessed the strength of eight oxens. In the area of a thousand miles, apart from Nine Dragon Cave's ninth head Black Dragon, he could be considered as the most formidable.

According to the classification of strength among ordinary people in this world, the power of nine oxens was the limit of physical strength for those who weren't cultivators.

In other words, the Nine Dragon Cave's nine heads should be between eight and nine oxens. Among them, the most formidable was Black Dragon, who definitely had the power of nine oxens.

An ox's power was equivalent to five hundred kilograms. So nine oxens were equivalent to 4.5 tons. So when they attacked, their fists contained several tens of tons in power.

Upon hearing this, the expressions of every person in the group of descenders turned gloomy, for they found it unimaginable. Based on this information, the strength of ordinary people in this world was just too terrifying.
